message:
feat(btrfs,core): add chunk/device tree walking and fix inline extent tail preservation

btrfs (ffs-btrfs):
- Add walk_chunk_tree() and walk_device_tree() functions for
  multi-device RAID stripe resolution infrastructure
- Add parse_chunk_item() for chunk tree entry decoding

Core (ffs-core):
- Fix inline extent write to preserve existing tail data when
  overwriting partial ranges (was silently dropping trailing content)
- Fix variable naming: unused _default_guard → default_guard in
  test logging setup
- Add test: btrfs_write_inline_overwrite_preserves_tail

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
